content.json:
# Entra ID — Identity Compromise Investigation
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1110 Brute Force · T1078 Valid Accounts · T1556 Modify Authentication Process

**Data source:** `SigninLogs`, `AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs`, `AuditLogs` (Entra ID diagnostic settings → Log Analytics).

> Pivot from a suspect user or IP using the parameters, then walk failures → spray → legacy auth → risky sign-ins.

content.query: SigninLogs | where ResultType != 0 | summarize Failures=count() by ResultType, ResultDescription | sort by Failures desc
content.title: Sign-in failures by reason

content.query: SigninLogs | where ResultType in (50126,50053,50055,50056) | summarize Users=dcount(UserPrincipalName), Targets=make_set(UserPrincipalName,20), Attempts=count() by IPAddress | where Users >= 5 | sort by Users desc
content.title: Password spray — one IP failing across many users — T1110.003

content.query: SigninLogs | where ClientAppUsed in ('Other clients','IMAP4','POP3','SMTP','Exchange ActiveSync','Authenticated SMTP','MAPI Over HTTP') | summarize Count=count() by UserPrincipalName, ClientAppUsed, AppDisplayName | sort by Count desc
content.title: Legacy authentication (MFA-bypassing) — T1078

content.query: SigninLogs | extend Risk=tostring(RiskLevelDuringSignIn) | where Risk in ('high','medium') | summarize Count=count(), IPs=make_set(IPAddress,15) by UserPrincipalName, Risk | sort by Count desc
content.title: Risky sign-ins (Entra Identity Protection)
